zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville於1142年出生在英國坎布利其爾布時，她的父親Geoffrey de Waterville18歲，母親Asceline Peverel28歲。她與William Dyve結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1228年在英國享年86歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: "Maud"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville was born in 1142, in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, Geoffrey de Waterville, was 18 and her mother, Asceline Peverel, was 28. She married William Dyve. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1228, in England, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville est née en 1142, à Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Waterville, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Asceline Peverel, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William Dyve. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1228, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville 1142 in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey de Waterville 18 und ihre Mutter Asceline Peverel 28. Sie hat William Dyve geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1228 im Alter von 86 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville è nata il nel 1142 nel Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, Geoffrey de Waterville, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Asceline Peverel, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato William Dyve. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1228, nel England, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilda "Maud" de Watervilleが1142年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアボウルンで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Watervilleは18歳，母Asceline Peverelは28歳であった。William Dyveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1228年にイギリスで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville(이)가 1142년 영국 캄브리지실르 부른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de Waterville(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Asceline Peverel(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 William Dyve(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1228년 영국에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville nasceu em 1142, em Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de Waterville, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Asceline Peverel, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William Dyve. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1228, em Inglaterra, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville родилась в 1142 г. в местности бурн, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffrey de Waterville было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Asceline Peverel, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Dyve. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1228 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville nació en 1142, en Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de Waterville, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Asceline Peverel, tenía 28 años. Se casó con William Dyve. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1228, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años.
